name: IGH_InstanceGuidDependent
summary: Implement this interface in your IGH_DocumentObject class if you want to be informed when the InstanceGuids of objects in the document are mutated.

methods.name: InstanceGuidsChanged
methods.summary: This method will be called by the GH_Document that owns this object after it mutates some or all of it's object InstanceIds.

params.name: map
params.doc: A translation dictionary of old InstanceID keys (no longer existent) and new InstanceID values.
